revision_summary:
Three targeted fixes required before Stage 3 is production-ready:

1. TRANSPORTATION FRAGILITY CORRECTION (affects multi_touch_patterns, cherry_pick_moments[2], trajectory_verdict, coaching_focus[1]): The appointment is a phone call — the rep stated this explicitly at 02:12 and the customer accepted without objection. All references to transportation dependency as an active fragility factor should be corrected. The real fragility is (a) daughter as unconfirmed co-decision-maker for the phone call, (b) no verify items captured, (c) prior no-show. The false parallel in coaching_focus[1] ('falls apart the same way the first one did') must be removed — the first miss was illness, not a scheduling conflict.

2. SCHEMA REFERENCE CORRECTIONS (affects cherry_pick_moments[2] and cherry_pick_moments[4]): (a) cherry_pick_moments[4] cites verify.interest_in_solar but the coaching point is about homeowner and title verification — correct to verify.address_homeowner_confirmed and verify.title_co_owners. (b) cherry_pick_moments[2] cites only protocols.spouse_decision but the more precise match is protocols.adult_child_decision_maker, which the schema defines explicitly for this scenario. Add this reference and note the distinction.

3. ADD MISSED CHERRY_PICK MOMENT — VERIFY GAP AT CALL SHAPE LEVEL (ts 02:20): Stage 3 notes the verify gap in the handoff_brief but never surfaces it as a standalone cherry_pick entry. The rep's decision to skip the entire verify section on a re-schedule call where the prior appointment was missed before any qualification occurred is a call_shape failure distinct from the empathy miss. Add a cherry_pick entry classifying this as a call_shape/verify_gap with schema reference to call_shape.required_beats and verify section.

Minor: Remove corpus-ranking language in trajectory_verdict ('one of the richest vulnerability disclosures in the corpus') — Stage 3 cannot rank against the full corpus. Replace with non-comparative framing. Remove the 'It costs nothing' editorializing in cherry_pick_moments[0] coaching_implication.
